prompt: Create a highly detailed Eastern dark fantasy weapon concept poster showing exactly 2 ancient Chinese-style polearm weapons crossed into a symmetrical X composition. Both weapons must be fully visible from blade tip to handle end, centered like a collector-grade weapon design sheet. The left weapon is bright silver-white engraved metal, with a pale crescent axe blade, dragon-scale carving, horned beast-head details, layered ornate metalwork, and subtle red gem accents. The right weapon is blackened steel with crimson inner glow, with a darker crescent axe blade, jagged demonic spikes, dragon-like carved armor plates, red fissures, and glowing red eye-like accents. The two long handles cross near the center and taper to pointed, decorated spear-like butt ends. Use a cold matte gray misty background with a huge circular ink-brush magic array behind the weapons, painted in dark gray Chinese ink strokes. Add exactly 2 clusters of black plum blossom branches with vivid red blossoms, one on the lower left and one on the lower right, plus scattered red petals floating around the composition. Style: premium dark fantasy, Eastern ink painting atmosphere, intricate metallic engraving, sharp high-contrast edges, realistic concept art rendering, dramatic soft shadows, faint fog, symmetrical centered layout, no text, no people, no watermark.
